complete.message: Welcome to the forge! Your mining station is ready, by me beard!

welcome.title: Welcome to the Deep Mines
welcome.description: Inventorium be yer rune-guided mining hall — task ledgers, quarry charts, and mountain views all in one.
welcome.subtitle: Let's delve through the tunnels to help ye get started.

projects-overview.title: Mine Shafts
projects-overview.description: Organize yer excavation tasks into shafts for better ore management and vein visualization.

benefits.visualize: See mineral richness at a glance

projects-overview.hint: ⛏️ Miner's Wisdom: Every task can belong to a mine shaft

create-project.title: Forge New Quarry
create-project.description: Let's establish a new quarry to organize yer mining. Quarries help ye group related excavations together.
create-project.step1: Strike the floating '+' button in the bottom right corner
create-project.step2: Select the 'Quarry Claim' tab in the scroll
create-project.step3: Enter a unique claim name (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., 'iron-deep-01')
create-project.step4: Add a display name and survey notes
create-project.hint: Tip: Claim names must be unique and use lowercase runes with hyphens

add-todo.title: Carve Mining Task
add-todo.description: Now let's carve a mining task for yer quarry. These are the veins ye need to extract.
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Excavation' tab in the scroll
add-todo.step4: Select yer quarry from the dropdown
add-todo.hint: Tip: Ye can order excavations from any tunnel using the '+' button

configure-ai.title: Bind Yer Forge Familiar
configure-ai.description: Strengthen yer mining with a bound rune-engine (like Google Gemini or OpenAI) to lend counsel when the tunnels get tricky.

benefits.enhance: Enrich task descriptions with ore insights
benefits.analyze: Map quarry dependencies and lava flows

configure-ai.helpText: Ye can bind yer familiar anytime from Settings → Forge Familiar Setup

ai-assistant.title: Ask the Forge Familiar
ai-assistant.description: Get counsel to manage digs, read ore patterns, and keep the clan movin' fast.
ai-assistant.hint: ⛏️ Miner's Wisdom: Click the forge interface to start smithing

instructions.title: How to forge blueprints:
instructions.step1: Install the blueprint forge: npm install -g @madnessengineering/uml-generator
instructions.step2: Generate blueprints from yer codebase: uml-generator /path/to/project -o project-uml.json
instructions.step3: Upload the generated scroll using the button above
